demos.title: Foundation Chat
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. This is the smallest production-ready chat slice and the recommended first install.

demos.title: RAG Chatbot
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Uses a portable sample retrieval index by default; add DATABASE_URL and pgvector when you want custom document indexing.

demos.title: Multimodal Chatbot
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Use a model that can process the image or PDF parts you send.

demos.title: Object Generation
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Keep the route model aligned with the structured output schema.

demos.title: Memory & Persistence Agent
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Uses visitor-scoped in-memory persistence by default; add DATABASE_URL when you want Postgres-backed memories and compaction checkpoints.

demos.title: Streaming Chat Shell
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Useful as the smallest replayable streaming shell after Foundation Chat.

demos.title: Loop Agent
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Use a model with reliable tool-calling behavior for the approval loop.

demos.title: Trace Eval Agent
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. It adds trace, deterministic checks, and judge output around one research run.

demos.title: Persistent Agent
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Uses in-memory chats and local streams by default; add DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL when you want durable chats and resumable streams.

demos.title: Sandbox Agent
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Runs a local sandbox and local preview route by default; Vercel Sandbox credentials are optional for remote sandbox execution.

demos.title: Skills Agent
demos.setup: AI Gateway only. Runs skill loading and file tools in a local sandbox by default; Vercel Sandbox credentials are optional for remote execution.

demos.title: MCP Agent
demos.setup: AI Gateway only for the base chat. Local Next.js runtime inspection depends on the installed MCP tooling.

demos.title: OpenAI Agents SDK Demo
demos.setup: Complete full-stack OpenAI Agents SDK install. AI Gateway drives the main chat happy path with AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY; native OpenAI API keys and public voice transport wiring unlock realtime voice, SIP, Twilio, and Cloudflare lanes.

demos.title: LangGraph Agent
demos.setup: Requires a separately running LangGraph backend. Start local-first with apps/langgraph-agent-api on http://localhost:2024, then set LANGGRAPH_AGENT_API_URL, LANGGRAPH_AGENT_ASSISTANT_ID, and LANGGRAPH_AGENT_API_KEY in the installed Next.js app.

demos.title: Ultra Chatbot Agent
demos.setup: Complete full-stack Ultra install. Configure AI Gateway, Postgres, Redis, Vercel Blob, and Vercel Sandbox credentials. AI Gateway, Postgres, and Redis drive the main chat happy path; Blob and Sandbox drive Ultra uploads and sandbox execution.
